dataSafety.title: Data safety
dataSafety.para1: This site never stores your data on any backend. Everything is kept in your browser (LocalStorage, IndexedDB, etc.), so there's no risk of data leakage.
dataSafety.para2: Pinned tools are also stored locally — switching browsers or clearing cache will lose them.
